title: Survival + Performance All Versions
description: Adds Survival and Performance Mods. For all Versions.
body:
This modpack for every Version is for survival server or worlds and adds useful mods how zoom, Waypoints, worldmap, voice chat, replay, animations or fullbright. This modpack improves your performance too (sodium, entity culling etc).
DISCLAIMER: SOME MODS ARE BANNED ON SERVERS CHECK THAT ALL MODS ARE ALLOWED!
